exceptions.reason: Accepted only for pipeline testing after visual review; regenerate for production.
Source contour was visually complete and output had no paste clamp; not approved for production.

blockers: Missing jump_start, rise, fall, land, launch, tumble, death, and ability art.
Current proof body sheets bake a brass pistol into Nori and violate CharacterData x WeaponData separation.
Identity turnaround and production identity master are not approved.
Walk must be regenerated to pass the normal grounded anchor gate without an exception.
No approved runtime PNG paths exist under game/assets/characters/nori-courier/.
Shared Godot character manifest loader has not been implemented or tested.
notes: Nori is evidence that the pipeline can preserve identity across difficult poses. It is not a shippable or Godot-ready bundle.
